query:
-- Shift all payout months forward by 1 month to match the new rule:
-- commission is paid 1 month AFTER contract start date.
-- We use a safe approach: compute new year/month from the existing values.
UPDATE commission_payouts
SET 
  payoutYear = CASE 
    WHEN payoutMonth = 12 THEN payoutYear + 1 
    ELSE payoutYear 
  END,
  payoutMonth = CASE 
    WHEN payoutMonth = 12 THEN 1 
    ELSE payoutMonth + 1 
  END;

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_payouts_updated FROM commission_payouts;

-- Shift all payout months forward by 1 month to match the new rule:
-- commission is paid 1 month AFTER contract start date.
-- We use a safe approach: compute new year/month from the existing values.
UPDATE commission_payouts
SET 
  payoutYear = CASE 
    WHEN payoutMonth = 12 THEN payoutYear + 1 
    ELSE payoutYear 
  END,
  payoutMonth = CASE 
    WHEN payoutMonth = 12 THEN 1 
    ELSE payoutMonth + 1 
  END;

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_payouts_updated FROM commission_payouts;
